name: Ice Ryzeal
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by sending 1 card from your hand or field to the GY. If Summoned this way, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only Special Summon "Ice Ryzeal" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Ryzeal" monster from your Deck, except "Ice Ryzeal". You can only use this effect of "Ice Ryzeal" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by sending 1 card from your hand or field to the GY. If Summoned this way, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only Special Summon "Ice Ryzeal" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Ryzeal" monster from your Deck, except "Ice Ryzeal". You can only use this effect of "Ice Ryzeal" once per turn.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by sending 1 card from your hand or field to the GY. If Summoned this way, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Rank 4 Xyz Monsters. You can only Special Summon "Ice Ryzeal" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Ryzeal" monster from your Deck, except "Ice Ryzeal". You can only use this effect of "Ice Ryzeal" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for Special Summon
Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Rank specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
